message:
So, the other day, I was out for a walk with my dog, Max, when he decided that the squirrel in the tree was his arch-nemesis. Suddenly, I found myself in an all-out tug-of-war as he lunged toward the furry foe. In the chaos, I realized I hadn’t even brought my phone or any of the usual snacks and water for us—talk about not being ready! 

As I wrestled with Max, I couldn’t help but chuckle at the absurdity of the moment. It reminded me that sometimes, life throws us unexpected curveballs, and while I had a good laugh, I also thought about how a little preparedness goes a long way. 

If only I had a plan for squirrel encounters! 😂 Thankfully, this little refresher helped me think about what to keep handy for our next adventure. What’s your go-to item when you head out with your pet?
